title: Proposed cutoff
text:
Use the standard deviation control to define cutoff scores (mean - k*SD), where k is one of: 0.5, 1, 1.5, or 2. The table updates dynamically and shows each questionnaire (quest) by domain as: cutoff score (percentage of children below cutoff).

title: Overall
text: This dashboard summarizes ASQ-3 Saudi results and is organized in the left sidebar. Use Overall for sample-level indicators and trends by questionnaire month (quest), Descriptive statistics to build custom Table 1 outputs, and Psychometric results to review reliability estimates across domains and questionnaires.
